---
title: "Testing Log"
subtitle: "Record of integration test runs, feature verifications, and production validations"
date: last-modified
listing:
  contents: testing-log
  type: table
  fields: [date, title, categories, status]
  field-types:
    status: String
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: [categories]
  sort-ui: false
---

Each entry is a dated record of a test campaign. Use the **category filter** to narrow by type.

| Category | When to use |
|----------|-------------|
| `integration-run` | Execution of `Rscript tests/run_tests.R` against pipeline output from one or more profiles |
| `verification` | Pre-production checklist for a specific feature branch or PR |
| `production-validation` | Scientific comparison validating output quality against a reference (legacy workflow, prior run, or known ground truth) |
| `scenario` | Targeted test for a specific edge-case scenario (e.g., non-marker CV pool, three-species run) |

::: {.callout-note}
See [Testing Workflow Guide](testing-workflow.qmd) for instructions on when to run each type of test and how to add entries to this log. The existing testing procedure pages ([Local Integration Testing](testing-integration.qmd), [HPC End-to-End Testing](testing-hpc.qmd), [Output Validation](testing-output-validation.qmd)) cover the mechanics of running each tier.
:::
